अनुसूची-II में क्र म सं. 67तथा इनसे संबंजधत प्र जवजियों के बाद, जनम्न क्र म संख्या तथा प्र जवजियां जोडी जाएंगी, नामत : स्ट् थान राज्य जस्ट्थजत पीयू स्ट् टेिन का अजधकार क्षे र 77 जनोरी, नाजसक Delhi, the 2nd March, 2020 S.O. 953(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 3 of the Destructive Insects and Pests Act, 1914 (2 of 1914), the Central Government hereby makes the following Order further to amend the Plant Quarantine (Regulation of Import into India) Order, 2003, namely:- 1. Short title and Commencement.- (1) This Order may be called the Plant Quarantine (Regulation of Import into India) (Third Amendment) Order, 2020. (2) It shall come into force on the date of its publication in the Official Gazette. 2.
